backlog_cursor.description: Run 4 on 2026-02-22. Processed #858-#974. Labelled #858, #930, #944, #931, #934. Commented on #961. Next run should start from oldest unlabelled issues not yet processed (e.g. #872, #885, #897, #910, #918, #924, #926-#929, #933, #949, #951, #952) or loop back to #72 for a fresh sweep.

970.description: Provided API migration guidance for Literate.FormatLiterateNodes to WriteHtml/ToHtml

961.description: Explained that docfx [!code-fsharp[...]] syntax is not supported by fsdocs; suggested pre-processing or feature request
